2026/05/16 02:28:34.010295266 width, height, onefile, family, title, fonts, version, paper,
2026/05/16 02:28:34.010335597 encoding, bg, fg, pointsize, pagecentre, colormodel, useDingbats,

2026/05/16 02:28:34.010355037 {

2026/05/16 02:28:34.010385983 if (!missing(height))
2026/05/16 02:28:34.010399944 new$height <- height
2026/05/16 02:28:34.010400676 if (!missing(onefile))
2026/05/16 02:28:34.010409098 new$onefile <- onefile

2026/05/16 02:28:34.010465193 new$version <- version
2026/05/16 02:28:34.010465633 if (!missing(paper))
2026/05/16 02:28:34.010487176 new$paper <- paper
2026/05/16 02:28:34.010487597 if (!missing(encoding))
2026/05/16 02:28:34.010496971 new$encoding <- encoding
2026/05/16 02:28:34.010497742 if (!missing(bg))
2026/05/16 02:28:34.010513115 new$bg <- bg
2026/05/16 02:28:34.010513956 if (!missing(fg))
2026/05/16 02:28:34.010522089 new$fg <- fg
2026/05/16 02:28:34.010532655 if (!missing(pointsize))
2026/05/16 02:28:34.010533396 new$pointsize <- pointsize
2026/05/16 02:28:34.010545965 if (!missing(pagecentre))
2026/05/16 02:28:34.010546375 new$pagecentre <- pagecentre
2026/05/16 02:28:34.010568609 if (!missing(colormodel))

2026/05/16 02:28:34.010585715 if (!missing(useDingbats))

2026/05/16 02:28:34.010616351 if (!missing(useKerning))

2026/05/16 02:28:34.010633156 if (!missing(fillOddEven))

2026/05/16 02:28:34.010648850 if (!missing(compress))
2026/05/16 02:28:34.010649571 new$compress <- compress
2026/05/16 02:28:34.010664594 old <- check.options(new, name.opt = ".PDF.Options", envir = .PSenv)
2026/05/16 02:28:34.010666127 if (!missing(family) && (inherits(family, "Type1Font") ||
2026/05/16 02:28:34.010686588 inherits(family, "CIDFont"))) {
2026/05/16 02:28:34.010687619 enc <- family$encoding
2026/05/16 02:28:34.010697093 if (inherits(family, "Type1Font") && !is.null(enc) &&
2026/05/16 02:28:34.010697534 enc != "default" && (is.null(old$encoding) || old$encoding ==
2026/05/16 02:28:34.010709432 "default"))
2026/05/16 02:28:34.010709853 old$encoding <- enc
2026/05/16 02:28:34.010718416 family <- family$metrics
2026/05/16 02:28:34.010718876 }
2026/05/16 02:28:34.010756073 if (is.null(old$encoding) || old$encoding == "default")
2026/05/16 02:28:34.010756924 old$encoding <- guessEncoding()
2026/05/16 02:28:34.010770454 if (!missing(family)) {
2026/05/16 02:28:34.010770875 if (length(family) == 4L) {

2026/05/16 02:28:34.010780379 }
2026/05/16 02:28:34.010789193 else if (length(family) == 5L) {
2026/05/16 02:28:34.010789613 }
2026/05/16 02:28:34.010798106 else if (length(family) == 1L) {
2026/05/16 02:28:34.010798557 pf <- pdfFonts(family)[[1L]]
2026/05/16 02:28:34.010831637 if (is.null(pf))
2026/05/16 02:28:34.010832448 stop(gettextf("unknown family '%s'", family),
2026/05/16 02:28:34.010848092 domain = NA)
2026/05/16 02:28:34.010848562 matchFont(pf, old$encoding)
2026/05/16 02:28:34.010857846 }
2026/05/16 02:28:34.010858347 else stop("invalid 'family' argument")
2026/05/16 02:28:34.010867391 old$family <- family
2026/05/16 02:28:34.010867821 }
2026/05/16 02:28:34.010875924 version <- old$version

2026/05/16 02:28:34.010885819 "2.0")

2026/05/16 02:28:34.010917547 else stop("invalid PDF version")

2026/05/16 02:28:34.010940942 stop(gettextf("invalid 'file' argument '%s'", file),
2026/05/16 02:28:34.010941423 domain = NA)
2026/05/16 02:28:34.010951258 .External(C_PDF, file, old$paper, old$family, old$encoding,

2026/05/16 02:28:39.097504413 function (file = if (onefile) "Rplots.pdf" else "Rplot%03d.pdf",
2026/05/16 02:28:39.097512725 width, height, onefile, family, title, fonts, version, paper,
2026/05/16 02:28:39.097545575 encoding, bg, fg, pointsize, pagecentre, colormodel, useDingbats,
2026/05/16 02:28:39.097557573 useKerning, fillOddEven, compress)
2026/05/16 02:28:39.097559826 {
2026/05/16 02:28:39.097573707 initPSandPDFfonts()
2026/05/16 02:28:39.097574569 new <- list()
2026/05/16 02:28:39.097589271 if (!missing(width))
2026/05/16 02:28:39.097590443 new$width <- width
2026/05/16 02:28:39.097604895 if (!missing(height))
2026/05/16 02:28:39.097605626 new$height <- height
2026/05/16 02:28:39.097620107 if (!missing(onefile))
2026/05/16 02:28:39.097620799 new$onefile <- onefile
2026/05/16 02:28:39.097630483 if (!missing(title))
2026/05/16 02:28:39.097642441 new$title <- title
2026/05/16 02:28:39.097643463 if (!missing(fonts))
2026/05/16 02:28:39.097666968 new$fonts <- fonts
2026/05/16 02:28:39.097672296 if (!missing(version))
2026/05/16 02:28:39.097694250 new$version <- version
2026/05/16 02:28:39.097745797 if (!missing(paper))
2026/05/16 02:28:39.097754521 new$paper <- paper
2026/05/16 02:28:39.097763975 if (!missing(encoding))
2026/05/16 02:28:39.097765117 new$encoding <- encoding
2026/05/16 02:28:39.097779028 if (!missing(bg))
2026/05/16 02:28:39.097779769 new$bg <- bg
2026/05/16 02:28:39.097792408 if (!missing(fg))
2026/05/16 02:28:39.097813610 new$fg <- fg
2026/05/16 02:28:39.097829705 if (!missing(pointsize))
2026/05/16 02:28:39.097830796 new$pointsize <- pointsize
2026/05/16 02:28:39.097849464 if (!missing(pagecentre))
2026/05/16 02:28:39.097850336 new$pagecentre <- pagecentre
2026/05/16 02:28:39.097874663 if (!missing(colormodel))
2026/05/16 02:28:39.097875414 new$colormodel <- colormodel
2026/05/16 02:28:39.097897207 if (!missing(useDingbats))
2026/05/16 02:28:39.097898068 new$useDingbats <- useDingbats
2026/05/16 02:28:39.097910336 if (!missing(useKerning))
2026/05/16 02:28:39.097919901 new$useKerning <- useKerning
2026/05/16 02:28:39.097920722 if (!missing(fillOddEven))
2026/05/16 02:28:39.097935174 new$fillOddEven <- fillOddEven
2026/05/16 02:28:39.097936055 if (!missing(compress))
2026/05/16 02:28:39.097950717 new$compress <- compress
2026/05/16 02:28:39.097951529 old <- check.options(new, name.opt = ".PDF.Options", envir = .PSenv)
2026/05/16 02:28:39.097969155 if (!missing(family) && (inherits(family, "Type1Font") ||
2026/05/16 02:28:39.097969967 inherits(family, "CIDFont"))) {
2026/05/16 02:28:39.097986802 enc <- family$encoding
2026/05/16 02:28:39.097987613 if (inherits(family, "Type1Font") && !is.null(enc) &&
2026/05/16 02:28:39.098003066 enc != "default" && (is.null(old$encoding) || old$encoding ==
2026/05/16 02:28:39.098004258 "default"))
2026/05/16 02:28:39.098024108 old$encoding <- enc
2026/05/16 02:28:39.098031910 family <- family$metrics
2026/05/16 02:28:39.098032811 }
2026/05/16 02:28:39.098044959 if (is.null(old$encoding) || old$encoding == "default")
2026/05/16 02:28:39.098045861 old$encoding <- guessEncoding()
2026/05/16 02:28:39.098075756 if (!missing(family)) {
2026/05/16 02:28:39.098076597 if (length(family) == 4L) {
2026/05/16 02:28:39.098090158 family <- c(family, "Symbol.afm")
2026/05/16 02:28:39.098090869 }
2026/05/16 02:28:39.098104119 else if (length(family) == 5L) {
2026/05/16 02:28:39.098104910 }
2026/05/16 02:28:39.098117519 else if (length(family) == 1L) {
2026/05/16 02:28:39.098118210 pf <- pdfFonts(family)[[1L]]
2026/05/16 02:28:39.098132051 if (is.null(pf))
2026/05/16 02:28:39.098132802 stop(gettextf("unknown family '%s'", family),
2026/05/16 02:28:39.098149027 domain = NA)
2026/05/16 02:28:39.098149758 matchFont(pf, old$encoding)
2026/05/16 02:28:39.098163979 }
2026/05/16 02:28:39.098164680 else stop("invalid 'family' argument")
2026/05/16 02:28:39.098178011 old$family <- family
2026/05/16 02:28:39.098178812 }
2026/05/16 02:28:39.098190610 version <- old$version
2026/05/16 02:28:39.098191321 versions <- c("1.1", "1.2", "1.3", "1.4", "1.5", "1.6", "1.7",
2026/05/16 02:28:39.098226674 "2.0")
2026/05/16 02:28:39.098227605 if (version %in% versions)
2026/05/16 02:28:39.098240375 version <- as.integer(strsplit(version, "[.]")[[1L]])
2026/05/16 02:28:39.098241827 else stop("invalid PDF version")
2026/05/16 02:28:39.098262679 onefile <- old$onefile
2026/05/16 02:28:39.098263570 if (!checkIntFormat(file))
2026/05/16 02:28:39.098278363 stop(gettextf("invalid 'file' argument '%s'", file),
2026/05/16 02:28:39.098279134 domain = NA)
2026/05/16 02:28:39.098298964 .External(C_PDF, file, old$paper, old$family, old$encoding,
2026/05/16 02:28:39.098299785 old$bg, old$fg, old$width, old$height, old$pointsize,
2026/05/16 02:28:39.098319084 onefile, old$pagecentre, old$title, old$fonts, version[1L],
2026/05/16 02:28:39.098320036 version[2L], old$colormodel, old$useDingbats, old$useKerning,
2026/05/16 02:28:39.098347527 old$fillOddEven, old$compress)
2026/05/16 02:28:39.098348418 invisible()
2026/05/16 02:28:39.098370682 }

2026/05/16 02:28:40.429728217 if (!missing(pointsize))

2026/05/16 02:28:40.429951335 "default"))

2026/05/16 02:28:40.430037976 }

2026/05/16 02:28:39.097754521 new$paper <- paper
2026/05/16 02:28:39.097763975 if (!missing(encoding))
2026/05/16 02:28:39.097765117 new$encoding <- encoding
2026/05/16 02:28:39.097779028 if (!missing(bg))
2026/05/16 02:28:39.097779769 new$bg <- bg
2026/05/16 02:28:39.097792408 if (!missing(fg))
2026/05/16 02:28:39.097813610 new$fg <- fg
2026/05/16 02:28:39.097829705 if (!missing(pointsize))
2026/05/16 02:28:39.097830796 new$pointsize <- pointsize
2026/05/16 02:28:39.097849464 if (!missing(pagecentre))

2026/05/16 02:28:39.097920722 if (!missing(fillOddEven))
2026/05/16 02:28:39.097935174 new$fillOddEven <- fillOddEven
2026/05/16 02:28:39.097936055 if (!missing(compress))
2026/05/16 02:28:39.097950717 new$compress <- compress
2026/05/16 02:28:39.097951529 old <- check.options(new, name.opt = ".PDF.Options", envir = .PSenv)
2026/05/16 02:28:39.097969155 if (!missing(family) && (inherits(family, "Type1Font") ||
2026/05/16 02:28:39.097969967 inherits(family, "CIDFont"))) {

2026/05/16 02:28:39.097987613 if (inherits(family, "Type1Font") && !is.null(enc) &&
2026/05/16 02:28:39.098003066 enc != "default" && (is.null(old$encoding) || old$encoding ==
2026/05/16 02:28:39.098004258 "default"))
2026/05/16 02:28:39.098024108 old$encoding <- enc
2026/05/16 02:28:39.098031910 family <- family$metrics
2026/05/16 02:28:39.098032811 }
2026/05/16 02:28:39.098044959 if (is.null(old$encoding) || old$encoding == "default")

2026/05/16 02:28:39.098076597 if (length(family) == 4L) {

2026/05/16 02:28:39.098104910 }
